_publications._publicationTitle: Using Durometers to Quantify Stiffness as an Outcome Measure for Cutaneous Neurofibroma in Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: The REX was similarly easy to use, but a potential limitation depended considerably on the user-applied force between the device and tumor. The device did not inherently have a user checking system; therefore, applying more user force during measurements could potentially yield falsely higher readings
details: Potential limitation depends considerably on user-applied force; applying more force could yield falsely higher readings due to lack of inherent user checking system
